meaning: n.塞勒姆(英国索尔兹伯里教区的古罗马名)
examples: Look, Sir, I'm as happy as the next man that Sarum is back in power.
George Tye had lived in Sarum Avenue, Melksham, for about 20 years when he died in 2011.
Three Neolithic-style huts have been built at Old Sarum to offer an insight into how Stonehenge's builders lived.
